phase1.name: Foundation
phase1.description: Core practice management and patient communication systems

phase2.name: Digital Workflow
phase2.description: Scanning, design, and fabrication pipeline integration

phase3.name: AI & Analytics
phase3.description: AI diagnostic platforms and business intelligence dashboards

phase4.name: Patient Experience
phase4.description: Patient-facing portals, smile design previews, and PALOMA deep integration

systems.name: Dentrix G7
systems.description: Core practice management system handling patient records, scheduling, billing, insurance claims, clinical notes, and treatment planning.

apiAvailability.documentation: Available via Henry Schein developer portal

dataFlows.data: Patient demographics, insurance info, appointment schedules
Treatment plans, completed procedures, billing codes
PALOMA conversation logs, patient engagement metrics

compliance.encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit
compliance.baa: Business Associate Agreement required and signed

systems.notes: Primary source of truth for all patient data. PALOMA will read from Dentrix but never write clinical data directly.

systems.name: Medit Link
systems.description: Cloud platform for managing digital impressions captured with the Medit i700 wireless intraoral scanner. Stores 3D scan data, enables case sharing, and connects to CAD/CAM workflows.

dataFlows.data: Scan completion notifications, case metadata, scan quality scores

compliance.encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.2+ in transit

systems.notes: Dr. Brenes is a KOL for Medit. Priority access to beta API features. Scanner captures 70+ scans/week.

systems.name: Pearl Second Opinion AI
systems.description: FDA-cleared AI platform that analyzes dental radiographs in real-time to detect pathology including caries, periapical lesions, calculus, and bone loss. Provides a 'second opinion' overlay on panoramic and periapical X-rays.

dataFormat.output: JSON findings with confidence scores + annotated image overlay

dataFlows.data: AI findings (pathology detections with confidence scores, annotated images)

palomaIntegration.status: Phase 3 - AI findings feed into PALOMA dental chart

compliance.encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit

systems.notes: Pearl findings are integrated into the dental chart view. PALOMA references AI confidence scores when explaining findings to patients.

systems.name: Overjet Dental AI
systems.description: FDA-cleared AI platform specializing in quantitative measurement of bone loss and caries detection on dental radiographs. Provides precise millimeter measurements and ADA classification of findings.

dataFormat.output: JSON with bone levels (mm), caries classification (ADA), periodontal measurements

dataFlows.data: Quantitative bone loss measurements, caries classifications, periodontal scores

palomaIntegration.status: Phase 3 - Quantitative data for patient education

compliance.encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.2+ in transit

systems.notes: Overjet complements Pearl by providing quantitative measurements. Used together for comprehensive AI-assisted diagnosis.

systems.name: SprintRay Pro 95S
systems.description: High-speed dental 3D printer for chairside fabrication of surgical guides, temporary crowns, denture bases, night guards, models, and custom trays. Integrated with SprintRay Pro S wash and cure stations.

dataFormat.input: STL/OBJ mesh files from CAD software
dataFormat.output: JSON print job status, material consumption data

dataFlows.data: Print job status, completion notifications, material usage, maintenance alerts

reads: Print job status for patient cases
palomaIntegration.status: Phase 2 - Status tracking for same-day cases

compliance.baa: Not required (no PHI in print files)

systems.notes: Dr. Brenes is a KOL for SprintRay. Prints an average of 15-20 items per week including surgical guides, temps, and models.

systems.name: Exocad DentalCAD / ChairsideCAD
systems.description: Industry-leading dental CAD software for designing crowns, bridges, implant abutments, full-arch restorations, and smile designs. ChairsideCAD provides streamlined chairside workflows for same-day restorations.

apiAvailability.workaround: File system monitoring for completed designs (STL/3MF output folders)

dataFlows.data: Completed design metadata, design screenshots, case status

systems.notes: Dr. Brenes is a KOL for Exocad. No REST API available — integration via file system monitoring and manual case tracking.

systems.name: SmileCloud
systems.description: Cloud-based smile design platform for creating photorealistic smile mockups, 2D/3D smile simulations, and patient presentation materials. Integrates patient photos with digital wax-ups for treatment visualization.

dataFormat.output: Smile simulation images, before/after comparisons, PDF presentations

dataFlows.data: Smile design renderings, before/after simulations, case presentations

reads: Smile design previews for patient presentation

compliance.encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.2+ in transit

systems.notes: Used for case acceptance presentations. PALOMA will eventually show patients their smile design previews during virtual consultations.

systems.name: Google Calendar
systems.description: Google Workspace calendar used for provider scheduling, team meetings, CE events, and KOL lecture commitments. Supplements Dentrix scheduling for non-clinical events.

dataFlows.data: Provider availability, blocked times, CE events

systems.notes: Used alongside Dentrix scheduling. PALOMA checks Google Calendar for Dr. Brenes' availability when helping patients find appointment times.

systems.name: Weave
systems.description: Unified patient communication platform handling phone, text, email, and review management. Provides appointment reminders, recall notifications, payment requests, and two-way texting with patients.

dataFlows.data: Incoming patient messages, missed calls, review alerts

palomaIntegration.status: Phase 1 - Communication channel for PALOMA outreach

compliance.encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit

systems.notes: Primary channel for PALOMA to send post-op care instructions, appointment reminders, and follow-up messages to patients via SMS.

systems.name: BlueSkyBio Blue Sky Plan
systems.description: Free implant planning software for virtual implant placement, surgical guide design, and CBCT analysis. Integrates with BlueSkyBio implant catalog for component selection.

apiAvailability.workaround: DICOM/STL file exchange via shared network folder

dataFormat.input: DICOM CBCT volume + STL intraoral scan
dataFormat.output: STL surgical guide + PDF implant planning report

dataFlows.data: Implant planning reports, surgical guide designs

systems.notes: Dr. Brenes is a KOL for BlueSkyBio. Software is free — key differentiator for accessible implant planning.

dataArchitecture.primaryDataStore: Dentrix G7 (source of truth for patient data)

palomaDataLayer.description: PALOMA maintains a read-only cache of relevant patient data, refreshed via scheduled syncs and real-time webhooks. All clinical data originates from Dentrix.
palomaDataLayer.cacheStrategy: Incremental sync every 15 minutes + real-time webhooks for appointments and messages
palomaDataLayer.storageFormat: JSON documents in structured file system
palomaDataLayer.retentionPolicy: Patient data cached for active session only; historical data references Dentrix directly

securityModel.auditLogging: All data access logged with timestamp, user, and action
securityModel.encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit
securityModel.dataMinimization: PALOMA only caches data necessary for the current patient interaction
